title: schefflera divaricata
intro: Schefflera divaricata, also known as Umbrella Tree or Variegated Schefflera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Schefflera divaricata are believed to offer various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and improved digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Schefflera divaricata can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
